check_item: Every shipped font has an original source URL
Every shipped font has evidence URL or bundled license-file location
Mirror-only fonts are replaced or verified from original source
Commercial-use signal is recorded for each font
Raw font file redistribution status is recorded
Required license or copyright notices are included
Modified fonts have derivative-name and reserved-name review
Logo/title font usage has separate brand/title review
Glyph coverage and fallback behavior are tested
Final re-check date is recorded close to release
